all.critique:
Below is a plain‐English review of the analysis with notes on potential issues:

1. Dynamic Batching Details (Medium Severity)  
 • The writeup explains two strategies (sum‐based accumulation and maximum‐length estimation), but it isn’t entirely clear which one the code actually uses. In particular, the wording “L_max” is introduced without a clear statement of whether it applies to the source side, the target side, or both. This ambiguity in the batching strategy could lead to different batch s
